semantic.role: This document configures the GitHub issue template settings for the ArchSpine project, specifically controlling blank issues and directing users to a community discussion board.
responsibilities: Defines whether blank issue submissions are allowed
Provides a contact link for questions and general discussion
outOfScope: Detailed issue templates for bugs, feature requests, or documentation

English.purpose: Establish the official GitHub issue configuration for the ArchSpine repository, disabling blank issues and guiding contributors to the project's GitHub Discussions forum for Q&A and general talk.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for repository administrators and contributors who interact with the ArchSpine GitHub repository. It sets a policy that all non-template issues should be raised through the Discussions board, helping maintain a clean and organized issue tracker focused on actionable bug reports and feature requests.
key_takeaways: Blank issue submissions are disabled; users must use an issue template or Discussions.
A contact link pointing to GitHub Discussions is provided for questions and general talk.
The configuration ensures that only properly structured issues are filed in the main tracker.
